defaults.hook_text: HE PLAYED WITH A BROKEN NECK

videos.video_subject: Bert Trautmann: the Nazi prisoner of war who played an FA Cup final with a broken neck
videos.video_script: He was a Nazi prisoner of war. So when Bert Trautmann signed for Manchester City, twenty thousand fans protested in the streets. A German, in goal, for England? Never. But his saves were so impossible that the boos slowly turned into cheers. Then came the 1956 FA Cup final. Diving at a striker's feet, he smashed his neck and collapsed. He could barely see. But he refused to come off. He kept making saves, and City won the cup. Three days later, an X-ray revealed the truth. He had played the end of that final with a broken neck. He survived, and became a legend.
